reports.summary: AutoResearchClaw is a fully autonomous research pipeline that takes a single topic idea and generates a complete, conference-ready academic paper with zero human intervention. It handles literature gathering, citation verification, experiment code generation/execution, multi-agent peer review, and outputs a compile-ready LaTeX document through integration with OpenClaw.

repos.name: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
repos.what_it_does: Autonomous end-to-end research pipeline that converts a single research idea into a publication-ready academic paper, handling literature review, citation verification, experiment execution, peer review, and LaTeX generation without human intervention.
top_10_functions: 1. Autonomous literature gathering — collects real research papers relevant to the topic
2. Citation verification — validates and eliminates fake or hallucinated citations
3. Experiment code generation — automatically writes code for research experiments
4. Experiment execution — runs generated experimental code autonomously
5. Multi-agent peer review — simulates academic peer review using LLM agents
6. LaTeX document generation — outputs publication-ready formatted papers
7. OpenClaw integration — provides chat interface for simple idea-to-paper workflow
8. Scientific discovery automation — end-to-end research pipeline orchestration
9. Paper structure generation — creates proper academic paper formatting and sections
10. Zero-intervention workflow — fully autonomous operation from idea to final paper
repos.recommendation_reason: Promising concept with solid traction (668 stars, 1128 tests passed) but this is bleeding-edge AI automation for academic research. The quality and scientific rigor of fully autonomous papers is unproven. Best used as a research assistant or draft generator rather than a replacement for human researchers. MIT license is permissive, but ethical concerns around AI-generated academic work need consideration. Worth experimenting with for ideation and rapid prototyping, but validate all outputs thoroughly.
repos.best_for: Researchers and academics who want to accelerate literature review, experiment scaffolding, and paper drafting; PhD students exploring research directions; teams prototyping research ideas quickly; developers building AI-assisted research tools.

reports.summary: Shopify's CEO demonstrated pi-autoresearch, an autonomous AI agent that runs experimental optimization loops. The tool was used to optimize Shopify's Liquid template engine, achieving 53% speed improvement and 61% memory reduction through 120+ autonomous experiments.

repos.name: davebcn87/pi-autoresearch
repos.what_it_does: An autonomous experiment loop extension for pi that iteratively tries optimizations, measures results, keeps improvements, and discards failures without human intervention.
top_10_functions: 1. init_experiment — Configure optimization session with name, metric, unit, and direction
2. run_experiment — Execute any command, time wall-clock duration, and capture output
3. log_experiment — Record results, auto-commit changes, and update dashboard
4. /autoresearch command — Enter autonomous optimization mode with custom targets
5. Resume capability — Automatically continue previous sessions from autoresearch.md
6. Live widget — Real-time progress tracking in editor interface
7. Dashboard view — Full results table with experiment history and metrics
8. /autoresearch off — Stop auto-resume while preserving experiment data
9. /autoresearch clear — Reset all state and start fresh optimization session
10. Keyboard shortcuts — Toggle between inline widget and fullscreen dashboard views
repos.recommendation_reason: This is production-grade automation for performance optimization. With 1912 stars and proven results on Shopify's infrastructure (53% speed, 61% memory gains), it's a force multiplier for teams that need systematic optimization without burning senior engineer hours. Works for any metric: test speed, bundle size, training loss, build times.
repos.best_for: Performance-focused teams optimizing hot paths, DevOps engineers reducing build times, ML engineers tuning training pipelines, and organizations that want autonomous continuous improvement without dedicated performance engineering resources.

reports.summary: Garry Tan (YC CEO) open-sourced gstack, a TypeScript framework that transforms Claude Code into a team of specialized AI personas (CEO, Engineering Manager, QA Engineer, Release Manager) via slash commands. It forces strategic planning before coding and includes browser automation for full-stack QA testing.

repos.name: garrytan/gstack
repos.what_it_does: Extends Claude Code with 9 workflow skills that act as specialized team members, adding strategic planning, code review, automated shipping, browser-based QA testing, and engineering retrospectives through slash commands.
top_10_functions: 1. /plan-ceo-review — Forces strategic product thinking before implementation, helps identify the true 10-star product opportunity
2. /plan-eng-review — Technical planning mode that defines architecture, data flow, diagrams, edge cases, and test strategy
3. /review — Deep code review by paranoid staff engineer persona, triages Greptile comments and catches production-breaking bugs
4. /ship — One-command release workflow that syncs main, runs tests, resolves reviews, and opens PR
5. /browse — Browser automation that gives AI visual context by logging in, navigating your app, and capturing screenshots
6. /qa — Full QA cycle that tests app, finds bugs, fixes them with atomic commits, and re-verifies with health scores
7. /qa-only — Report-only QA testing that documents bugs without making code changes
8. /setup-browser-cookies — Session manager for importing browser cookies to maintain authenticated testing sessions
9. Greptile integration — Automated review comment triage and resolution during code review and shipping workflows
repos.recommendation_reason: 15K+ stars validate strong adoption. This is opinionated tooling from a proven operator that addresses the core problem of AI coding assistants: they implement literally without strategic thinking. The browser automation and multi-tier QA are differentiators. TypeScript implementation means it's maintainable and extensible.
repos.best_for: Solo founders and small teams shipping products with Claude Code who want structured AI collaboration, automated QA, and strategic planning guardrails without building custom prompts or workflows from scratch.

reports.summary: This post showcases app-store-screenshots, an AI-native skill that automates the entire process of creating marketing screenshots for iOS App Store submissions. It integrates with AI coding agents like Claude Code and Cursor to generate advertisement-style screenshots with marketing copy, 3D device frames, and properly sized assets for all Apple device requirements.

repos.name: ParthJadhav/app-store-screenshots
repos.what_it_does: An AI-powered skill for coding agents that generates production-ready App Store screenshots by scaffolding a Next.js project, designing advertisement-style visuals with marketing copy, and exporting at all required Apple resolutions.
top_10_functions: 1. Interactive interview — asks about app brand, features, and style preferences
2. Next.js scaffolding — creates or integrates with existing Next.js projects
3. Advertisement design — creates marketing-focused screenshots instead of UI showcases
4. AI copywriting — generates compelling marketing copy using proven App Store patterns
5. iPhone mockup rendering — includes pre-measured iPhone frame with transparent screen area
6. Multi-resolution export — outputs PNGs at all 4 Apple-required sizes (6.9", 6.5", 6.3", 6.1")
7. Locale support — generates locale-based screenshot sets with localized copy
8. Theme presets — allows reusable templates for quick art direction changes
9. RTL layout support — handles right-to-left languages automatically
10. Bulk export — generates combinations across locale/device/theme variations
repos.recommendation_reason: Proven in production (Apple-approved app in store), saves significant time on a tedious manual process, strong community adoption (2791 stars), and works with multiple AI coding agents. The advertisement-focused approach is more effective than raw UI screenshots for App Store conversion.
repos.best_for: iOS developers and indie makers launching apps who want to automate screenshot creation and marketing copy generation, especially those already using AI coding agents like Claude Code or Cursor.
